description: Family medicine board exam knowledge base: queryable question bank (1,629 questions, 2018-2025) linked to a clinical guideline library (1,936 articles, 404 PDFs) via a structured SQLite pipeline. Extends beyond exam prep into clinical decision support.
git_status: main branch. Latest commit: cd32816 (BATON 015). New commit needed for BATON 016 session work.

module_structure.00_database: Source of truth (DB + supporting data, schemas, logs)
module_structure.01_module.1_warehouse: PDF library (4 tiers, 404 PDFs) + M1 scripts (build/9, maintain/16) + aafp_brq/scraper+staging
module_structure.02_module.2_processor: Extraction + enrichment pipeline (49 Python + 6 JS + 1 JSON + 4 Windows, all paths dynamic)
module_structure.03_module.3_analyst: Analysis scripts (4 Python + 1 JS + 2 JSON config)

supporting_folders.archive_canonical: Curated deliverables (curriculum, question bank, analysis, reference data, acquisition lists)
supporting_folders.extracted_json: Three subfolders: synthesis_library/ (242 legacy flat JSONs), VC_pass_batch/ (95), VC_fail_batch/ (147). Root clean (manifest.json only).
supporting_folders.key_data_files: Critical reference data: VC gate (session_hy_inserts_v7.json), exam CSVs, missing articles list, FILE_NAMING_SPEC, Intelligence 2.0 architecture, project inventory, script library

pdf_library.VC_fail: 146 PDFs (codon-named, awaiting full pipeline — not VC-cited)

codon_convention: Author_Year#@#ART-XXXX@#@.pdf — ART-ID embedded between #@# start and @#@ stop codon. Strategy 0 = regex parse of codon. Primary match strategy in all enrichers.
vc_gate: key_data_files/session_hy_inserts_v7.json (352 citations — sole criterion for right_click vs local_lite tier assignment)

intelligence_layers.layer_2_pubmed: NOT STARTED — article_currency table, superseded_by chains

designed_not_yet_built.article_citation_trend: Companion table: years_cited, distinct_year_count, first_cited_year, most_recent_year, consecutive_streak, is_watch_list. Derived from qid_art_xref via pure SQL.
designed_not_yet_built.update_citation_trends.py: M1/maintain/ — populates article_citation_trend. Pure SQL, no API. ~40 lines.
designed_not_yet_built.extract_ite_critique_refs.py: M2/scripts/ — local PDF-native critique ref extractor. pdfplumber, dispatcher architecture, zero API cost. Replaces DOCX dependency for future year integration.

script_path_convention.no_hardcoded_paths: All paths dynamic — no C:\Users\... anywhere in scripts
script_path_convention.no_de_novo_js: New code = Python only. Existing JS scripts migrate fine.

key_conventions.source_data_protected: DB + PDFs + VC gate survive everything. Derivatives (JSONs, DOCXs, CSVs) are disposable.
key_conventions.schema_first: Define SQL schema before writing build script
key_conventions.fix_data_not_code: Upstream data cleanup preferred over defensive code complexity
key_conventions.strategy_0_first: Codon parse always the first matching strategy in every enricher
key_conventions.baton_supersedes_all: Active BATON is the source of truth for current state

aafp_brq.description: AAFP Board Review Questions: 135 quizzes x 10 questions. Separate table schema from ITE questions.
aafp_brq.key_finding: Near-identical AAFP-ITE pairs at dist<0.27 (likely direct question reuse). Linked vs unlinked mean dist gap: 0.4497 vs 0.6973.
aafp_brq.known_gap: 129 missing questions (~13 incomplete quizzes from FUSE oplock stall during scrape)

HIGH: AAFP question reuse investigation — query WHERE ite_nearest_dist < 0.30; confirm exact dupes vs paraphrased
AAFP-ITE lag analysis — xref + shared citations + timing delta + ite_nearest_dist signal
AAFP ref matching second pass — 784 unmatched citations; vol/page + guideline keyword → target 70-80%
229 citation gap articles — 88 AFP batch-downloadable from null_clean_ref_missing_articles_20260326.csv
MEDIUM: Interactive vector dashboard — HTML from aafp_vector_explorer data (data:interactive-dashboard-builder)
129 missing AAFP questions — ~13 incomplete quizzes from stalled scrape
Cookie refresh — aafp_cookies.json session cookies before next scrape
Intelligence 2.0 Layer 2 — article_currency via PubMed MCP
LOW: FLAG 33 — VC_pass ART-ID rename scheme: designed, not implemented
Right_click DOCX regeneration — 71 DOCXs regenerable via build_summary.js
